heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the shops, restaurants, and small businesses of Belmont and the Charlotte metro. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Belmont and the Charlotte metro.
localP1: Belmont sits on the south bank of the Catawba River, directly across from Charlotte. The Benedictine Order founded Belmont Abbey College here in 1876, and the Abbey Basilica of Mary Help of Christians still stands as a landmark, named a minor Basilica by the Vatican in 1998. But Belmont is also known for the Daniel Stowe Botanical Garden, a 380-acre estate with formal gardens and trails that made it onto HGTV's list of the nation's best gardens. What holds it together is Main Street, revitalized with local shops, restaurants, and cafes anchoring the historic downtown.
localP2: We build for the people who keep Main Street going: the cafe owner, the antique dealer, the boutique, the shop on the corner. We serve the contractors, small manufacturers, and home-service crews across Gaston County and into the Charlotte commute shed. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
